response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates deep technical breadth across distributed systems, high-throughput architectures, and AI-agent infrastructure with strong ownership and operational experience, aligning well with the role’s core demands; however, his Python exposure is not explicitly highlighted, and while he has AI-adjacent experience, direct LLM or agentic code production review is implied rather than detailed, leaving some uncertainty on AI-native fluency.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at Acme Software, directly relevant to AI-driven code production environments.
Extensive background in high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby).
Strong operational ownership evidenced by full-stack contributions, CI/CD setup, on-call readiness, and open-source project leadership.
concerns: Python expertise is not explicitly mentioned despite being a must-have skill; focus is on TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js.
Limited detail on direct experience reviewing or extending AI-generated code — agentic workflow exposure is noted but not demonstrated in depth.
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder stakeholder coordination in a Berlin-based team.
